message:
chore(beads): close br-r37-c1-jxvsu (5 missing-node drifts)

Fixed in commit bdb5648.  ssbf_path/_length now emit nx's exact
'Source X not in G' wording (was Rust's quoted-repr variant);
all_shortest_paths uses distinct NodeNotFound (source) /
NetworkXNoPath (target) classes matching nx; bfs_layers raises
NetworkXError on missing source instead of silently yielding
nothing.

Sweep: 7112 passed, 0 failed (+11 new regression tests; one
pre-existing test re-expressed against nx's actual class).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
